name: Tailscale
description: Private network access — reach your Crow from any device without exposing it to the public internet
author: Crow

env_vars.name: TS_AUTHKEY
env_vars.description: Tailscale reusable auth key — generate at https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys (select 'Reusable')

notes: Creates a private Tailscale tunnel so you can access your Crow at http://crow/ from any device on your Tailnet. Requires a free Tailscale account. Self-hosted only — not available on managed hosting.
